title: butomopsis lanceolata
intro: Butomopsis lanceolata, also known as the water shield or duck potato, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Butomaceae. The medicinal properties of Butomopsis lanceolata include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Butomopsis lanceolata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
